pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-claude-code
pkgs.description: Claude Code engine adapter for Ikenga — wraps the `claude` CLI as the default AI engine.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-noop
pkgs.description: No-op engine adapter for Ikenga — proves the engine pluggability pattern; used as a test fixture and for shell-without-AI mode.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-hello
pkgs.description: Minimal Ikenga pkg — proves the registry install pipeline end-to-end without bringing any UI, sidecar, or MCP surface.
